task_completion.description: Verify the Subject, Related To (Organization), and Contact Name are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Service Contract form or detail view showing the Subject as 'Annual Grounds Maintenance - Riverside Office Park', Related To as 'Riverside Property Management', and Contact Name as 'Diana Mercer'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Start Date and End Date are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Start Date field showing '2025-07-01' and the End Date field showing '2026-06-30' in the contract details.

task_completion.description: Verify the Tracking Unit, Total Units, and Used Units are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Tracking Unit dropdown/field set to 'Hours', Total Units set to '500', and Used Units set to '0'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Contract Type, Priority, and Status are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Contract Type set to 'Service', Priority set to 'Normal', and Status set to 'In Progress'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Service Contract was successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success notification, the contract displayed in a read-only detail view (no longer in edit mode), or the new contract listed in the Service Contracts list view.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Vtiger CRM web interface to create the contract.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Vtiger CRM application. There should be no evidence of terminal commands or API scripts being used to create the contract.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard web UI elements (input boxes, dropdowns, date pickers, save buttons) being actively used and populated, rather than just a text file or notes app displaying the target values.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI using direct database manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows open showing MySQL queries or PHP scripts inserting the record directly into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected Service Contract details are: Subject: 'Annual Grounds Maintenance - Riverside Office Park', Related To: 'Riverside Property Management', Contact Name: 'Diana Mercer', Start Date: '2025-07-01', End Date: '2026-06-30', Tracking Unit: 'Hours', Total Units: '500', Used Units: '0', Contract Type: 'Service', Priority: 'Normal', Status: 'In Progress'.
